purpose: Biome-specific detail decal source image for dungeon map baking

tileability_requirements: detail cluster should remain self-contained inside the square
decal should be usable as a sparse overlay without visible box boundaries
avoid directional lighting that conflicts with surrounding floor art
global_style_rules.intended_use: small-scale floor decal placed sparsely over baked floor chunks
global_style_rules.fidelity_target: localized readable imperfection that matches the biome floor family
composition_rules: top-down isolated decal or small decal cluster
keep most of the square empty unless the decal type intentionally sprawls

decal_rules.overlap_behavior: should remain legible when used alone or in small groups

biome.description: Traditional dungeon corridors and chambers with small accumulated imperfections.

pattern_structure.base_pattern: one localized cluster of floor damage or growth
pattern_structure.placement_behavior: center-weighted or gently offset but self-contained
pattern_structure.scale: small readable imperfection intended to occupy a minority of the square
pattern_structure.variation: clear silhouette differences between variants without changing biome identity

color_and_light.shadow_behavior: minimal and tightly local to the decal

negative_constraints: no large debris pile unless explicitly generating rubble decals

output_notes.generator_instruction: Treat this full JSON as the image prompt. Prioritize transparent-background localized floor imperfections that can be composited sparsely over baked dungeon floors.
